global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on the NovaPay brand and its messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting the NovaPay app for financial clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and calming base for the ad.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The NovaPay logo appears at the top center, featuring a simple and modern design with a light color scheme.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two abstract geometric shapes, one circular and one square, are centered in the ad, rendered in a lighter shade of blue.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The headline text 'Your money, clearer' is prominently displayed in a bold, white font at the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: The supporting text 'Built for peace of mind' is positioned below the headline in a smaller, white font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: The 'Install now' button is located at the bottom center, featuring a clear and inviting design in white text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, NovaPay logo, clear messaging
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline and supporting text in the center, with the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your money, clearer, Built for peace of mind, NovaPay, Install now
